name: 威脅型（勢利反派的階級壓迫）
description: 反派用階級差距和外貌羞辱來壓迫主角，語言極盡尖酸刻薄。這類對白的功能是將觀眾的憤怒值推到最高點，為反擊積蓄最大能量。

examples.drama_title: [FULL HD] She Married a Homeless CEO?! | Full Mini Drama HD | Romantic Comedy Series
examples.excerpt: Look at you. You're just a broke, ugly, stinky girl. I can't even believe that you ever dreamed you were going to marry my son. / Security, take these people out. They're stinking up this place.
